overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing Batman walking along elevated industrial walkways in Gotham City at night. The scene features a large full moon, illuminated bridges, and an industrial harbor complex with processing towers and fires burning in the distance.

events.description: Batman begins walking forward along the elevated industrial platform

agents.ego_description: Batman walking steadily along the elevated industrial walkway with cape flowing, overlooking the city

entered.detail: Large bright full moon dominating the night sky above the city
Gothic-style bridge with warm yellow lighting spanning across the harbor
Metal grated elevated walkway with safety railings that Batman is traversing
Raised platform with blue glowing lights, likely a batmobile deployment point
Safety railings along the edge of the elevated industrial structure

segments.scene_description: Batman stands on an elevated industrial walkway overlooking Gotham City harbor at night. The large full moon illuminates the scene from above, while an ornate illuminated bridge spans the water in the distance. Batman begins walking forward along the metal grated platform, passing by a batmobile deployment platform with blue lights on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial harbor with processing towers and burning structures

events.description: burning fires become visible on the left side of the industrial complex ahead

agents.ego_description: Batman continuing along the walkway, approaching the industrial tower complex with visible fires

entered.detail: Tall industrial towers with red warning lights and smoke stacks rising from the harbor
Structure engulfed in flames with orange fire and smoke visible on the left side
Dark water of the industrial harbor visible below the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: As Batman continues walking, the camera pans to reveal the industrial harbor complex ahead, dominated by tall processing towers with red lights. Burning fires become visible on the left side of the frame, illuminating the smoke and industrial structures. The full moon and illuminated bridge from the previous segment move out of view as the focus shifts to the fiery industrial zone ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from a moonlit vista of the city harbor toward a fiery industrial complex. It begins with Batman standing on an elevated metal walkway under a large full moon, with an ornate illuminated bridge spanning the distant water. As he walks forward, the camera passes a batmobile deployment platform glowing with blue lights on the right. The scene then pans away from the moon and bridge to reveal a harbor complex dominated by tall processing towers with red lights. Finally, the focus shifts entirely to the industrial zone ahead as burning fires emerge on the left, casting a glow through the smoke and surrounding structures.
